prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约76名、72名、85名、78名、156名。2021–2024年位次稳定在72–85名区间，2025年大幅后移至156名，较2024年后移约78名，为近5年最大波动。2025年基准位次约156名；该校在辽宁省物理类招生计划：2021年43人、2022年42人、2023年41人、2024年41人、2025年45人、2026年47人。2025年较2024年扩招4人，2026年继续扩招2人，两年累计扩招约14.6%。扩招使名额增加，但可能吸引更多考生报考，竞争程度需综合判断。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 清华大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名2021–2026年连续位居第1名，为全国顶尖学府，对考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学校管理、校园安全等中性事件，对顶尖学校报考热度影响有限。抖音热度总排名第2（高热），短视频平台曝光度极高，反映报考关注度持续升温。2021–2025年投档线未见明显断档或暴跌信号；清华大学拥有大量A+学科（如计算机、机械、材料、建筑、电气、临床医学等），A-及以上学科数量远超10个，学科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生有极强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等清华优势工科专业社会热度持续高热；临床医学为高热推荐。辽宁省2026年高考总人数约20万，按近年比例估算物理类约14.28万人，较2025年（14.34万）基本持平。；清华大学位于北京，为全国性顶尖高校，在辽宁省无特殊地域偏好。该校在辽宁招生人数近年呈小幅增长趋势，2025年辽宁招生占比约8.5%，属正常跨省招生比例。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移趋势、2026年招生计划继续扩招（+2人）、本省考生总数基本持平、抖音高热反映关注度上升等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年基准156名基础上继续小幅后移。预测最低位次约170名，区间120–220名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（120–220名）内，建议以理科试验班（交叉工程等）为主攻方向（一档），临床医学类作为稳健选择（二档）。位次明显优于区间下限（<120名）可重点冲刺理科试验班王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>220名）需谨慎评估。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 76, 72, 85, 78, and 156 respectively. Rankings from 2021 to 2024 were stable within the 72–85 range, but in 2025 there was a significant drop to 156, a shift of about 78 places compared to 2024, marking the largest fluctuation in five years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 156. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Liaoning Province: 43 in 2021, 42 in 2022, 41 in 2023, 41 in 2024, 45 in 2025, and 47 in 2026. Compared to 2024, enrollment increased by 4 in 2025, and will continue to increase by 2 in 2026, with a cumulative increase of about 14.6% over two years. The expansion increases the number of spots, but may attract more applicants, requiring comprehensive assessment of competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tsinghua University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking first consecutively in the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, making it a top national institution with strong appeal to applicants. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving neutral incidents such as school management and campus safety, which have limited impact on application enthusiasm for top schools. It ranks second in overall Douyin popularity (high heat), with extremely high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting continuously rising application attention. From 2021 to 2025, there were no obvious signs of score gaps or sharp drops in admission lines. Tsinghua University has numerous A+ disciplines (such as Computer Science, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science, Architecture, Electrical Engineering, Clinical Medicine, etc.), with over 10 disciplines rated A- or above, showcasing top national academic strength and strong appeal to high-scoring applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular Tsinghua engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social heat; Clinical Medicine is a highly recommended major. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao takers in Liaoning Province is approximately 200,000, with an estimated Physics Category count of about 142,800 based on recent proportions, roughly unchanged from 2025 (143,400). Tsinghua University is located in Beijing, a top national university with no special regional preference in Liaoning. Its enrollment in Liaoning has shown a slight upward trend in recent years, with the 2025 Liaoning enrollment share at about 8.5%, a normal cross-province enrollment ratio.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant downward trend in rankings in 2025, the continued expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+2), the basically unchanged total number of local candidates, and the high Douyin heat reflecting increased attention, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to slightly decline from the 2025 baseline of 156. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 170, with a range of 120–220.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Clinical Medicine Category (Clinical Medicine (PUMC), Clinical Medicine (Outstanding Physician Science Class)).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- None (This university only offers 2 major categories for Physics Category).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range (120–220), it is recommended to focus on the Science Experimental Class (Cross-Disciplinary Engineering, etc.) as the primary target (Tier 1), with Clinical Medicine Category as a stable choice (Tier 2). If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (<120), you can aim for the flagship majors in the Science Experimental Class; if your ranking is near the upper bound (>220), careful evaluation is needed.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 16th, 19th, 18th, 15th, and 22nd respectively. Over the past 5 years, rankings have fluctuated narrowly within the 15–25 range, with 2025's 22nd being the highest (worst) ranking in 5 years, moving back 7 places from 2024 (15th). The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 22nd; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Liaoning Province: 3 students each year from 2021 to 2023, 4 students each year from 2024 to 2025, and still 4 students in 2026. The enrollment plan has stabilized at 4 students since 2024, with no expansion or reduction in 2026.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tsinghua University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking 1st consecutively in the Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, making it a top-tier institution nationwide, with strong appeal to liberal arts candidates as well; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative, mainly involving neutral events such as school management and campus safety, which have limited impact on the popularity of top schools. Douyin heat total ranking 2nd (high heat), with extremely high exposure on short video platforms. From 2021 to 2025, there were no obvious signs of score gaps or sharp drops in admission lines; Tsinghua University also has strong strength in humanities and social sciences, with A+ in Marxist Theory, A+ in Law, A- in Sociology, A- in Chinese Language and Literature, etc., which strongly attract liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language/Literature have a social popularity rating of recommended/slightly hot; Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. The total number of Gaokao candidates in Liaoning Province in 2026 is about 200,000, with an estimated 57,200 in the History Category based on recent proportions, a slight increase from 2025 (56,300). Tsinghua University is located in Beijing, a top national university, with no special regional preference in Liaoning Province. The university enrolls very few students in the History Category in Liaoning (4 students), with competition concentrated among the top candidates in the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the long-term stability of History Category rankings within the 15–25 range, the enrollment plan remaining unchanged for 3 consecutive years (4 students), a slight increase in the number of candidates in the province but with limited impact, and the stable appeal of Tsinghua University to top liberal arts candidates, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be slightly lower than the 2025 baseline of 22nd (slightly intensified competition). The predicted minimum ranking is about 25th, with a range of 4–75.
